place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Sea-View Pool Residence, Bophut, Koh Samui
note: Fully staffed · private chef · + tax & service
blurb: A four-bedroom hillside residence of around 2,000 m² within a managed retreat in the Bophut hills, opening onto wide terraces and a 20-metre infinity pool with incredible sea views. Wood-lined vaulted ceilings, a wine-cooled open kitchen and a master suite with a terrazzo bathtub framing the ocean. A short drive from Bophut village and Maenam Beach; fully staffed with a private chef.
detail:
Luxurious tropical living defines this impressive four-bedroom hillside residence, set within a managed retreat in the Bophut hills. Stylish, comfortable furnishings and carefully selected natural materials give a distinct sense of place, and the clever design opens onto wide terraces and a 20-metre infinity pool, making it easy to spend hours enjoying the incredible sea views.

The expansive living and dining room showcases a high, wood-lined vaulted ceiling with windows on both sides that invite the views indoors. A square dining table sits beside the open-plan kitchen with its breakfast bar, high-end appliances, chrome fittings, marble surfaces and a built-in wine cooler, while the lounge opposite features a wall-mounted TV, sofas and a chaise. A covered balcony with a clear glass barrier runs the full length of the room over the garden and pool, with all-weather chairs for an afternoon of relaxation. Stairs on both sides lead down to three guest bedrooms facing the garden, pool and views, linked by a covered walkway that doubles as a shaded terrace.

Each of the three guest rooms is adjoined by an en-suite with a rain shower, all with king beds. On one side of the pool, sunken stools are served by a built-in bar within a covered sala that also houses a dining table and cushioned bench seats. On the other side, the master suite has a vaulted wooden ceiling and doors opening directly onto the pool terrace; a separate dressing area behind the king bed leads to an en-suite with twin washbasins, a rain shower and an oversized terrazzo bathtub with windows looking out to the ocean. Fully staffed with a private chef, a short drive from Bophut village and the tranquil Maenam Beach.

features.l: 20 m infinity pool · covered sala bar
